/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libs2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libs2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/s2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/s2_msgs/srv/detail/plugin_call__description.c.o CMakeFiles/s2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/s2_msgs/srv/detail/plugin_call__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/s2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/s2_msgs/srv/detail/plugin_call__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
